name: Gotoh SG381
description: Sealed-gear machine head with 16:1 ratio and Lubri-Coat coating; available in 3+3 and 6-in-line; mid-range flagship of the SG series

name: Gotoh SG301
description: Sealed-gear machine head with 18:1 ratio; larger body than SG381 with retention screw below post; not suitable for 6-in-line

name: Gotoh SG360
description: Sealed-gear machine head with 14:1 ratio; compact SG series tuner available in 3+3 and 6-in-line configurations

name: Gotoh SD90
description: Vintage-style open-gear machine head with 15:1 ratio; 3+3 array; available with Magnum Lock and HAP post options

name: Gotoh SD91
description: Vintage-style open-gear machine head with 15:1 ratio; classic Kluson-inspired styling; available for 3+3 and 6-in-line

name: Gotoh SDS510
description: Vintage-style SD510 series machine head with 15:1 ratio; features DSL mechanism and X-Finish coating

name: Gotoh SGS510
description: SG510 series sealed-gear machine head with 15:1 ratio; features X-Finish and Lubri-Plate; available in 3+3 and 6-in-line

name: Gotoh SGS510Z
description: SG510 series sealed-gear machine head with 18:1 ratio; premium precision over SGS510; supports MG and HAP-M post variants

name: Gotoh 35G510
description: Classical guitar open-gear machine head with 16:1 ratio; 35G510 series with precision roller nut and multiple plate materials

name: Gotoh SG381 MG-T
description: Sealed-gear Magnum Lock Trad locking tuner based on SG381 with 16:1 ratio; rear thumbwheel locks string post after tuning; fast restringing

name: Gotoh SD90 MG-T
description: Vintage-style Magnum Lock Trad locking tuner based on SD90 with 15:1 ratio; combines open-gear aesthetics with tool-free string locking

name: Gotoh SD91 MG-T
description: Vintage-style Magnum Lock Trad locking tuner based on SD91 with 15:1 ratio; Rock-Solid construction with rear thumbwheel string lock

name: Gotoh SG381 HAP-M
description: SG381 variant combining Magnum Lock and height-adjustable post (HAP) technology; individually tunable post heights for nut break angle optimization

name: Gotoh SGS510Z HAP-M
description: SGS510Z variant with integrated HAP-M locking post; 18:1 ratio; height-adjustable locking posts for precise per-string setup

name: Gotoh SD91 HAP-M
description: Vintage-style SD91 variant with HAP-M locking adjustable-height posts; 15:1 ratio; locking stability with post-height fine-tuning
